title: draba × microcarpa
intro: Draba × microcarpa, also known as the alpine whitlowgrass, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Draba × microcarpa include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or extracts, and it is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
